scripts.dev:clean: lsof -ti:3000,3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && rm -rf apps/web/.next apps/api/dist packages/ui/dist packages/types/dist && rm -f apps/api/tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo apps/api/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && turbo dev
scripts.judge:up: docker compose -f infra/judge0/docker-compose.yml up -d db redis && echo 'Waiting for Judge0 DB/Redis...' && sleep 10 && docker compose -f infra/judge0/docker-compose.yml up -d server workers && echo 'Judge0 starting on http://localhost:2358 (first run may take several minutes to pull images)'
scripts.judge:logs: docker compose -f infra/judge0/docker-compose.yml logs -f server workers
